discussions.author: John Doe
discussions.text: How do you plan to handle the installation barrier for non-technical homeowners? Even 'clip-on' sensors can be intimidating.

discussions.author: Jane Doe
discussions.text: Great question, John. We're partnering with local hardware stores to offer 'SmartPipe Certified' installation for a flat $49 fee, but the app also features an AR guide that has a 95% success rate in our pilots.
